item.description:
What's new in Sonault 1.4.0

  • Importing sounds now opens as a full screen from a dedicated Import sound button in the sidebar, instead of a cramped pop-up.
  • The paste form sits beside a quick three-step walkthrough, so it's clear how a link becomes a trimmed sound in your vault.
  • The sound details view is rebalanced, with the title and metadata centered next to the waveform.
